# Pale Blue Nexus

Making sense of the future, from right here.

## About

Pale Blue Nexus is a podcast by Yohann Calpu, co-founder of Aloomii. It features conversations with operators, founders, and investors at the frontier of AI, space, and emerging tech.

## Host

Yohann Calpu — Host of Pale Blue Nexus, Co-founder of Aloomii.

## Episodes

### Episode 01: Jim Rogers
Legendary investor and co-founder of the Quantum Fund.

- **Title:** What a Legendary Investor Told Me After 17 Years
- **Date:** 2026-02-24
- **Duration:** 36:07
- **YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t3dDHRRZyHk
- **Episode page:** https://palebluenexus.com/episodes/jim-rogers/
- **Markdown:** https://palebluenexus.com/episodes/jim-rogers/index.md
- **Guest website:** https://www.jimrogers.com

### Episode 02: Jack Couch
Founder of Sophtron, building the open financial internet.

- **Title:** Why Sales Is Dead and Podcasts Build Trust
- **Date:** 2026-03-10
- **YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4wwUJRkLB90
- **Episode page:** https://palebluenexus.com/episodes/jack-couch/
- **Markdown:** https://palebluenexus.com/episodes/jack-couch/index.md

## Brand

Pale Blue Nexus is a podcast brand under Aloomii.
